name: Samsung Axis Bank Signature Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 10% Cashback on Samsung purchases (up to Rs 2,500/month)

rewards.displayCategory: Preferred partners (BigBasket, Myntra, Tata 1mg, Urban Company, Zomato)
rewards.displayRate: 10 EDGE REWARD Points / Rs 100 spent (2.0% return value)
5 EDGE REWARD Points / Rs 100 spent (1.0% return value)

exclusions: Transactions excluded under Samsung Axis Bank Signature Credit Card terms

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 2,500 EDGE REWARD Points on completing 3 transactions within 30 days of card issuance

joiningBenefits: 2,500 EDGE REWARD Points on completing 3 transactions within 30 days of card issuance
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waived on annual spends greater than Rs 2 lakh
additionalBenefits: 10% cashback on Samsung purchases including EMI transactions, capped at Rs 2,500 per month and Rs 10,000 per annum
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per calendar year, subject to minimum eligible spend of Rs 50,000 in previous 3 months
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 500 per statement
Dining Delights offer of 15% off up to Rs 500 once per month at participating restaurants
Convert transactions of Rs 2,500 or more into EMI
